regime_fall.current_status: The U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports (begun April 13) has intensified military pressure while the ceasefire deteriorated by early July, with Iran's economy showing structural breakdown and authorities conducting mass arrests and lethal crackdowns on dissidents, signaling regime consolidation through force amid succession uncertainty and failed diplomatic negotiations.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Fatal IRGC/Basij shootings occurred in Hamedan and Khomein on July 2, with authorities conducting over 700 arrests by late June and executing 14 people including anti-government protesters as state repression escalates.
